lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real LLM-driven rework introducing the reusable agent.InvokeJudgment foundation; foundation + evaluator + SST-loader tests drive the proofs.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': the hospitality concern decision now flows through the hospitality_concern_evaluate scenario on the reusable agent.InvokeJudgment foundation; TestInvokeJudgment_* prove the primitive (routing, forwarding, json:"-" non-leak, nil-runner sentinel, error paths) and TestBridgeHospitalityEvaluator_* prove the hospitality batch path; the SST loader tests prove fail-loud operational caps.

scenarios.title: Reusable agent.InvokeJudgment primitive routes, forwards signals, hides internal fields, and reports errors
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: InvokeJudgment[T] marshals signals into IntentEnvelope{Source,ScenarioID}, forwards public fields, omits json:"-" fields, returns ErrJudgmentUnavailable on nil runner / nil result, and errors on non-OK / empty final / bad JSON.

scenarios.title: Hospitality concern judgment routes to the batched scenario and never leaks the internal guest email
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: EvaluateConcerns routes IntentEnvelope{ScenarioID: hospitality_concern_evaluate}, forwards guests {ref,name,total_stays,sentiment_score,total_spend} + properties {ref,name,issue_count,avg_rating}, omits guest Email (json:"-"), parses {guest_alerts,property_alerts}, short-circuits empty input, and errors on nil runner / nil result / non-OK / empty final / bad JSON.

scenarios.title: Operational hospitality candidate caps are fail-loud SST config
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Missing/empty DIGEST_HOSPITALITY_* keys fail loud naming the var; out-of-range values (guest/property candidate limit <= 0) are rejected.
